title: Homeomorphism Between Metric Spaces
description: A visual representation of a homeomorphism as a bijective, continuous function with a continuous inverse, mapping open sets between two metric spaces.
relationships: f is a bijection (one-to-one and onto)
f is continuous (pre-image of open set V is open set U)
f⁻¹ is continuous (pre-image of open set U is open set V)
